---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new or an improvement to an existing feature
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What problem does this solve?

<!--
Describe the problem you're running into or the limitation you've hit.
Focus on the "why", not the "what" — the solution might look different
once we understand the underlying need.

Example: "I can't currently filter memories by date, so I have to pull
all memories and filter client-side, which is slow on agents with 10k+ entries."
-->

## Proposed solution

<!--
How would you like this to work? Be as concrete as you can —
a new endpoint, a new parameter on an existing one, a change in behaviour, etc.
-->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!--
Are there other ways to solve this today, even if they're awkward?
Have you seen similar solutions in other tools?
-->

## Would you be willing to open a PR for this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement it
- [ ] Yes, but I'd need guidance
- [ ] No, just suggesting it

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, related issues, links to similar features in other projects, etc. -->
